Visual verification clearly shows '495' pounds, '2' shillings, and '20' pence. The '20' pence is an invalid amount (exceeds 11). Following standard currency conversion to produce a valid value, 2 shillings and 20 pence are interpreted as 3 shillings and 8 pence. Both extractors failed to correctly handle this invalid entry in the ledger; Gemini-flash proposed 10d without explanation, Gpt-5-mini proposed 0d after noting the invalid '20d'.
